metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5028
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 2: Dab1 synaptic localization was shown using immunofluorescence labeling with confocal imaging of Dab1, PSD-95 (DLG4) and synaptophysin (SYP). The imaging resolution is too low to narrow down localization to pre- and/or post-synapse.. Experimental description: Results, Figure 2 legend: "Synaptic localization of Dab1 in the adult forebrain. A, Western blot analysis of Dab1 in the homogenate (Hom) and crude SNS fractions of the WT and Dab1 KO cerebral cortex and hippocampus. The data (quantified from n = 4 WT mice)"

antibody:
anti-Dab1 B3 antibody at 1:1000 (provided by Dr. Brian Howell, SUNY Upstate Medical University)
